episodes.title: Wait...was I in a Cult???
episodes.description:
Join me while I take the Cult Compass Assessment created by @OwenMorganTelltale while I reflect on being a part of Assemblies of God World Missions, specifically Live Dead.
Link to test: https://cultcompass.org/assessment/

Time stamps for the test:
